display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Viliami steps up.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: The ghosts look back on Janet's Sweet Seventeen celebration in order to decode the truth of her past. S2 E3

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: With just four passengers left on board, the X-bus travels further into Europe and one step closer to that £100,000 prize.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is asked to run a foundation in Susan's memory. Elaine takes charge of the Peterman catalog. Jerry comes to a realization about his engagement. S8 E1

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Host Phil Keoghan invites 13 former BIG BROTHER players to compete on a journey around the world with their loved ones on the 38th season premiere of THE AMAZING RACE.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy drive themselves crazy trying to figure out what “perfect gift” Leonard and Penny got them for their wedding. Meanwhile, Raj asks his father to find him an arranged marriage. S12 E

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A decidedly odd couple with ulterior motives convince Dr. Grant to go to Isla Sorna for a holiday, but their unexpected landing startles the island's new inhabitants. Starring Sam Neill. (2001)

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: A factory worker begins to suspect he is a spy after visiting a company that provides its clients with implanted fake memories of a life they would like to have led. Starring Colin Farrell. (2012)

programme.title: Fresh Eggs
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Cutter’s demands, especially when the starstruck townsfolk get involved. Things turn toxic between Lulu and Walker, and Justin makes a connection. S1 E5

programme.title: Citadel
programme.desc: After the shocking revelation of Abby’s former identity, we learn of the past entanglements between Mason, Nadia and Celeste, and a horrific decision that reverberates still today. S1 E4

programme.title: C*A*U*G*H*T
programme.desc: With one day to create a hostage video that will keep them alive, Dylan Fox must teach the boys how to ‘act’, while Rowdy makes contact with his daughter. S1 E2

programme.title: Superman & Lois
programme.desc: Jonathan faces the pressures of his personal life and responsibilities. Meanwhile, Clark learns a truth that is unsettling. S4 E5

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: This week we are Keeping it Fresh at the Moana Showcase, Coco Shakim takes us into his World and NT Beats brings us the sounds of Thompson Park in Fresh Beats.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: Night Eyes
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of four film crews in their investigations of the various paranormal events that occur in their local area and their mission to help the locals deal with their ghostly problems.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Join the exciting time travelling adventures with Josh, Rangi, Kura, Toro, Tiare and Hikuroa as they set sail across the motu to find all the godsticks to get him back to the future to save the rohe.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Blind auditions begin with coaches Ronan Keating, Kate Miller-Heidke, Richard Marx, and Melanie C diligently searching for talent.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John feels the pressure. Abigail gets an ultimatum. Beau turns on the charm.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Adrian surprises his family by becoming successful, Jack plans to move in with Leonora, and Grandad's homing pigeon is given its first flight.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian sitcom from Carla Lane, the writer of Butterflies, The Liver Birds and Solo. Here, Mrs Boswell is concerned about Grandad, and Aveline is desperate for work.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a Liverpudlian family. Love is in the air as Lilo Lill pursues Freddie. Nellie meets her man from the park. Grandad reminisces about his beloved Edie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving in Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom. Joey's new shop is vandalised. Jack confesses to Adrian that he and Leonora are an item.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a close-knit family and their struggle to make ends meet. Billy makes an important decision after complaining that he is being neglected.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian japes in Carla Lane's long-running family sitcom. In this episode, Joey urgently tries to contact his mother after an accident in the family.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Adrian surprises his family by becoming successful, Jack plans to move in with Leonora, and Grandad's homing pigeon is given its first flight.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Liverpudlian sitcom from Carla Lane, the writer of Butterflies, The Liver Birds and Solo. Here, Mrs Boswell is concerned about Grandad, and Aveline is desperate for work.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a Liverpudlian family. Love is in the air as Lilo Lill pursues Freddie. Nellie meets her man from the park. Grandad reminisces about his beloved Edie.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More ducking and diving in Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom. Joey's new shop is vandalised. Jack confesses to Adrian that he and Leonora are an item.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's long-running sitcom about a close-knit family and their struggle to make ends meet. Billy makes an important decision after complaining that he is being neglected.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the American wilderness.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A secretive underground base that concealed the power to destroy nations, and a sprawling industrial relic clinging to the edge of an unforgiving waterfall.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the American wilderness.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A secretive underground base that concealed the power to destroy nations, and a sprawling industrial relic clinging to the edge of an unforgiving waterfall.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Watch out, Frank Spencer's about. At his woodwork class, Frank's carpentry leaves a lot to be desired, and his playhouse for Jessica is a whopper of a project.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick comedy with the hapless Frank Spencer. Frank enrols in a Scottish dancing class and everything seems to be going his way. Surely not for long..

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Ooh, Betty! It's Michael Crawford as Frank Spencer - the well-meaning and enthusiastic dunce. Frank's grandad arrives from Australia to find his grandson in drag.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford is the hapless but amiable Frank Spencer. The local labour exchange puts him to work as a motorbike courier - with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick mayhem with the hapless but friendly buffoon immortalised by Michael Crawford. Frank and Betty contemplate leaving England and emigrating to Australia.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Watch out, Frank Spencer's about. At his woodwork class, Frank's carpentry leaves a lot to be desired, and his playhouse for Jessica is a whopper of a project.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick comedy with the hapless Frank Spencer. Frank enrols in a Scottish dancing class and everything seems to be going his way. Surely not for long..

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Ooh, Betty! It's Michael Crawford as Frank Spencer - the well-meaning and enthusiastic dunce. Frank's grandad arrives from Australia to find his grandson in drag.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford is the hapless but amiable Frank Spencer. The local labour exchange puts him to work as a motorbike courier - with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick mayhem with the hapless but friendly buffoon immortalised by Michael Crawford. Frank and Betty contemplate leaving England and emigrating to Australia.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Angie and Shade navigate Toronto's complex hip-hop scene while searching for a missing 14-year-old who witnessed a violent nightclub shooting.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown is trapped in a derelict building when a former music hall comedian swears revenge.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Neville must solve a mystery from the past that unlocks the truth of who murdered renowned concert pianist Pasha Verdinikov and why.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is the detective hero in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch is taunted by a murderer who leaves dolls with personal messages at crime scenes.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Todd tries to convince his brother Lawrence to come home for Thanksgiving dinner. The family inadvertently helps Margaret crack a case involving an injured bank teller.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Crabtree's deranged kidnapper Amelia turns herself in, he braces for trouble.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a man resembling Murdoch is murdered, he must find the killer - before the killer finds him.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: With his family in hiding, Murdoch tries to discover who is behind the attempts on their lives.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: A treasure hunt brings Moses back to London from Paris to sell a priceless diamond, and Clarence is determined to prove that he is every bit as good as his predecessor.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: New Detective Inspector Charlie Phelps hires Eliza for a case involving his uncle. But Scotland Yard is also after the man, who has committed crimes in both jurisdictions.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 2: The team must prove Neville's innocence when he's arrested on suspicion of murder, especially when the inspector brought in is certain of his guilt.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth uncovers a dark secret when a contestant is murdered at a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Two Deaths of Hercule Flambeau: Following reports of Flambeau's death, the clerical sleuth races to protect a crown that contains a nail from the crucifixion of Christ.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: Mackenzie is presented with a classic locked-room murder when a hairdresser is found strangled to death in her beauty salon, with no evidence of a break-in.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: An activist is mysteriously bludgeoned to death while chained to an excavator with his group during a protest.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part 2: The team must prove Neville's innocence when he's arrested on suspicion of murder, especially when the inspector brought in is certain of his guilt.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown receives a visit from Chief Inspector Sullivan to inform him that Hercule Flambeau is on the run and wanted for a string of horrific killings.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a calypso singer's husband. Neville struggles with Sophie's revelations and contemplates his future in Saint Marie.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth uncovers a dark secret when a contestant is murdered at a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewson's auction is a 1275 Mini GT that's come from just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The boys head to Leicestershire for a furniture-filled shed belonging to Matthew, a French pieces enthusiast. Simon chooses a huge canoe, while Henry picks a gymnasium vaulting horse.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Sunderland-born actress Melanie Hill joins Robson on his pursuit of outdoor activities to help relax and recharge as they travel to one of the UK's biggest waterfalls.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by his uncle Matheson to test a night in a local youth hostel, sign up for a cookery class, take a guided walk on Hadrian's Wall and visit remote honey beehives.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A volcanic island just off Taiwan containing chilling ruins from its darkest era, and a zoo lies forgotten in the woods of Arkansas.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A fairy-tale castle that staged one of the strangest stories of the Second World War and a haunting complex on an old American frontier are explored.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the tube station with the most platforms, Baker Street.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to London's iconic Camden Town station - a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway begin their journey at South Kensington, home of Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you won't find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want to buy an MGB roadster but the cheaper GT version is the one they find. It's got a few rust patches, and back in the workshop they realise beauty is skin deep.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus want to buy a BMW, and Will says he likes the 'feminine' Z3. There's a trade-in up the road which might fit the bill, but it's a high price.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough showcases wildlife in coastal regions, from Cape fur seals on n South Africa's Robberg Peninsula to hungry lions on Namibia's infamous Skeleton Coast.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The wildlife inhabiting the world's oceans, from the shallow seas of the tropics where predators become the prey, to the greatest depths, captured on film.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Life in some of the many deserts and grasslands around the world, including in the Namib desert, where ostriches raise their family in the searing heat.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live in freshwater environments, from gliding treefrogs in the Costa Rican rainforest to mugger crocodiles in Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough journeys into the hidden world of forests, from the temperate rainforests of Canada, to the teak forests of India.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul, Mick and Charlie are in Hull for one of their biggest ever collections. Dave takes a test drive in Tesla Model X and Derek is bowled over by a classic vintage mo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family business starts a new era as Charlie heads off on his first solo collection, to pick up an Austin van from the North York Moors.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some very special working vehicles. Charlie feels the pull of a gargantuan Hummer and Paul extracts a vintage tractor from a Yorkshire barn.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Charlie picks up an iconic 60s motor - a Ford Cortina Deluxe - and a 1970s Morris van brings a taste of Carry On Camping to Pickering.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave meets the inspirational owner of a Reliant Robin who's selling it to raise money for charity.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache as they also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a child's tricycle from the 1960s while catching up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Rick introduces us to his beloved Sapphire Coast, and its exquisite seafood: his home away from home in Australia.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Jo never quite found the right career until she discovered leather work, but she needs it to pay her bills; Jill wants to fulfil her lifelong dream of making a living from art.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Season Finale: A crash turns a local kindy into a drive-though, there’s foam flying off a trailer in a gale, and a restricted driver speeding in a convertible is pushing his abilities and his luck.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: It’s the Battle of the Duds! Former losing contestants make a not-so-triumphant return to reclaim the victory they never had. Tom welcomes back experts on French and Saunders, Tiger Woods, and more.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: Week 4 of the Britains Got Talent semi finals and with only 2 to go, who can punch their ticket into the 2026 final?

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Bergerac looks into Nicola's shocking accusation, but is more focused on pursuing the possible role of police corruption in Tony's murder. S2 E2

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: Rachel feels further isolated as she learns she's been left out of an event for Anna. Meanwhile, Maggie receives big news of her own. S1 E5

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: As the team continues tracing Senior's money trail, they arrange a delicate meeting with a key accomplice, one that could expose them all. S2 E14

programme.title: Kidnapped: The Chloe Ayling Story
programme.desc: As Chloe prepares to leave the farmhouse, she questions whether MD will keep his word and is plagued by all the release conditions that have been set for her. S1 E3

programme.title: House Of Gods
programme.desc: While Isa struggles to meet his financial commitment to Seyyed Modhaffar, Batul emerges as her father's most strategic child. S1 E2

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Terry and Ashley are desperate to complete their first guest suite. Tim and Sharon have discovered something nasty lurking in their bathroom.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: A search for novel methods to control Black Spot in apples; a third generation upholds traditions of a Southland High Country station; and Massey Young Farmers club provides skills and connections.

programme.title: Find My Country House: Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan heads to Lancashire and Morecambe Bay. With its contrasting landscapes, quirky traditions, historic landmarks and community spirit, the region ranks as one of the best to visit in the UK.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Waka Huia
programme.desc: Waka Huia is an iconic archival documentary series recording the unique stories and histories of Maori for all New Zealanders.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Biscuit Week and the bakers make Viennese sandwiches, a retro minty favourite and dramatic puppet theatres. Who'll take centre stage, and who's delivered their final act?
